subcodes.first_line: O My sister! We beseech God to protect thee from the harms of the world. There hath been no news from thee for some time
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اختی نسئل الله بان یحفظک عن ضر العالمین و بعد چندیست که خبری از شما
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
